label: Remove sky — rewire null_shimmer direct to hsv_underwater, enhance portals to 5
notes: Sky removed as primary visual element. Rewired: null_shimmer → hsv_underwater input 0 (previously comp_pregrade → hsv_underwater). Shimmer shader rewritten: 5 portals (was 3), dark void core per portal (exp(-rW*rW*10) mask), per-portal arm count variation (3/4/3/5/3), wider drift radius (0.44/0.58 max), larger fade smoothstep (1.6 was 1.3), brightness raised to mix(0.42, 0.92, chaos). blur_shimmer range changed from tdu.remap(chaos,0,1,90,18) to tdu.remap(chaos,0,1,35,5) — portals are now primary element, need visible detail. Network cleanup: deleted comp_pregrade, comp_shimmer, null_sky, glsl_sky, glsl_sky_dat.

operations.note: 5 portals, void cores, arm variation, brightness raised
